entries.claim_text: Why Far Looks Up: Probing Spatial Representation in Vision-Language Models
entries.quoted_snippet: Why Far Looks Up: Probing Spatial Representation in Vision-Language Models

entries.claim_text: ECCV 2026
entries.quoted_snippet: year=2026
year=2026

entries.claim_text: Cheolhong Min, Jaeyun Jung, Daeun Lee, Hyeonseong Jeon, Yu Su, Jonathan Tremblay, Chan Hee Song, Jaesik Park
entries.quoted_snippet: Cheolhong Min

entries.claim_text: https://github.com/cheolhong0916/contrastive-probing
paper
entries.quoted_snippet: ECCV

entries.claim_text: 只能從間接視覺線索反推空間結構
entries.quoted_snippet: objects farther away on a common ground surface appear higher in the image

entries.claim_text: 較遠者 $y$ 值較小（位置較高）即為 consistent
entries.quoted_snippet: if the farther object has a smaller $y$-coordinate

entries.claim_text: consistent 佔 976 題（80.9%）
entries.quoted_snippet: consistent examples account for 80.9\% of EmbSpatial-Bench

entries.claim_text: counter 卻只剩 24.0%，落差高達 36.9 個百分點
entries.quoted_snippet: 60.9\% on the consistent split of EmbSpatial-Bench but only 24\% on counter examples, yielding a 36.9 percentage-point gap

entries.claim_text: 用 Blender 造了一個 tunnel（單點透視走廊）合成資料集
entries.quoted_snippet: we build a tunnel-shaped synthetic scene in Blender

entries.claim_text: 得到 $16\times16\times12=3{,}072$ 張影像
準確率落差 $\Delta=v_\text{cons}-v_\text{ctr}$
entries.quoted_snippet: \Delta = v_\text{cons} - v_\text{ctr}

entries.claim_text: 得到 $v_\text{cons}=0.776$；所有 counter 樣本平均則只有 $v_\text{ctr}=0.360$
entries.quoted_snippet: v_\text{cons} = 0.776$ but only $v_\text{ctr} = 0.360

entries.claim_text: 在同一測試上 $v=0.793$、$\Delta$ 只有 $+0.046$
entries.quoted_snippet: RoboRefer~\cite{zhou2025roborefer}, trained on more than 20M QA pairs, achieves the smallest gap

entries.claim_text: 構造一對只差在物體順序的問句
entries.quoted_snippet: we construct a pair of questions that differ only in the ordering of the queried objects

entries.claim_text: 並對相反那一側取負號使全部朝同一正向
entries.quoted_snippet: we negate the deltas from the opposing category so that all vectors point toward the canonical direction

entries.claim_text: 對 above、below、far、close 各算平均 delta $\mu_c$
entries.quoted_snippet: we compute the mean delta vector $\mu_c$ for each category

entries.claim_text: VD-EI 為正，代表垂直與距離表徵正如透視投影預測地耦合在一起
entries.quoted_snippet: A positive value indicates that vertical and distance representations are directionally coupled

entries.claim_text: 在每一個模型、每一個訓練規模上都是三軸中最低的
entries.quoted_snippet: is the lowest among the three axes

entries.claim_text: 微調會把垂直一致性拉得很高（Molmo 從 0.23 到 0.57、Qwen 從 0.29 到 0.59）
當距離一致性隨資料規模成長，counter 準確率會跟著上升
entries.quoted_snippet: counter accuracy rises in tandem
Qwen's $\CohD$ remains nearly flat throughout scaling ($0.043 \to 0.052$)

entries.claim_text: 對 EmbSpatial-Bench 是 $\rho=0.759$
家族內最高的 $\mathrm{Coh}_\mathrm{D}$（0.182）與最低的 VD-EI（0.362）
entries.quoted_snippet: the highest $\CohD$ ($0.182$) and the lowest \VDEI ($0.362$)

entries.claim_text: 遠高於 NVILA-2M 的 41.1%
entries.quoted_snippet: $59.7\%$ counter accuracy on EmbSpatial-Bench versus $41.1\%$ for NVILA (2M)

entries.claim_text: NVILA(2M) 在 CV-3D Depth 有 93.8%，到 BLINK Spatial Relation 卻掉到 62.9%
entries.quoted_snippet: NVILA (2M) achieves $93.8\%$ on CV-3D Depth but only $62.9\%$ on BLINK Spatial Relation

entries.claim_text: p=\sigma\!\bigl(\ell_{\texttt{Yes}}-\ell_{\texttt{No}}\bigr)
entries.quoted_snippet: p=\sigma\!\bigl(\ell_{\texttt{Yes}}-\ell_{\texttt{No}}\bigr)

entries.claim_text: \frac{2}{N(N-1)} \sum_{i < j} \cos
entries.quoted_snippet: \frac{2}{N(N-1)} \sum_{i < j} \cos

entries.claim_text: \cos(\mu_{\text{below}},\mu_{\text{close}})
entries.quoted_snippet: \cos(\mu_{\text{below}}, \mu_{\text{close}})

entries.claim_text: delta = h2 - h1
entries.quoted_snippet: Δr = h(r+) − h(r−) per layer

entries.claim_text: probing.py 實作 delta、coherence 與 6×6 相似度矩陣
entries.quoted_snippet: 6×6 cosine similarity of mean Δ per category

entries.claim_text: Qwen3-235B VD-EI 在高層震盪、沒有明顯平原（程式碼註解自承）
entries.quoted_snippet: layers without a clear plateau

entries.claim_text: 透視捷徑示意
entries.quoted_snippet: objects located higher in the image are further away in 3D

entries.claim_text: consistent 與 counter 樣本
entries.quoted_snippet: Farther object appears higher in the image

entries.claim_text: SpatialTunnel 固定兩物深度
entries.quoted_snippet: holds the two objects at fixed depths while sweeping their angular positions

entries.claim_text: contrastive probing 概念
entries.quoted_snippet: we construct a minimal question pair by swapping the object order

entries.claim_text: Counter 準確率對距離一致性
entries.quoted_snippet: Positive correlation between behavioral accuracy on counter examples

entries.claim_text: delta 向量的 PCA
entries.quoted_snippet: RoboRefer and Qwen3 exhibit three clearly separated clusters

entries.claim_text: EmbSpatial 只有 129 題、CV-Bench-3D 只有 65 題
作者自己也承認 RoboRefer
entries.quoted_snippet: we treat it as an illustrative reference rather than attributing its gains to a single factor

entries.claim_text: 但把它讀成「訓練目標」則超出了現有證據
小落差反映的是無能力而非無偏差
一致性平原（Spearman $\rho=0.928$）
Molmo-7B SpatialTunnel consistent 熱力圖 base->400k->2M 紅區擴張
entries.quoted_snippet: From base $\rightarrow$ 400k $\rightarrow$ 2M training samples, accuracy on (a) perspective-consistent cells improves steadily

entries.claim_text: Molmo-7B SpatialTunnel counter 熱力圖 400k 最深藍、2M 部分回升
entries.quoted_snippet: (b) counter cells remain substantially harder, with the largest drop at 400k and a partial recovery at 2M

entries.claim_text: 到 2M 雖回升成大片紅色，但紅得比 consistent 側淺
entries.quoted_snippet: counter cells remain substantially harder, with the largest drop at 400k and a partial recovery at 2M

entries.claim_text: 這些是整個資料集的聚合統計，不是單一格子或單次前向的值
entries.quoted_snippet: Mean accuracy} ($v$), the mean correctness score across all images and questions

entries.claim_text: CohD 對 VD-EI 散點:NVILA 微調變體聚右下,RoboRefer 獨佔低 VD-EI 高 CohD 區
entries.quoted_snippet: RoboRefer occupies a unique region of high coherence and low entanglement

entries.claim_text: 數值與正文 Table 4 逐列報告的選層值略有出入
entries.quoted_snippet: PCA visualizations are shown at $L{=}25$, where cluster separation is more visually distinguishable

entries.claim_text: 合成走廊(灰條)與真實 EmbSpatial(紅點)上的 CohD 並排,絕對值不同但家族內排序保留
entries.quoted_snippet: the relative ordering within each model family is largely preserved. The red box highlights the NVILA family, where the ranking is identical across both datasets

entries.claim_text: 的次序在合成與真實兩域完全一致
entries.quoted_snippet: RoboRefer ${>}$ NVILA\,2M ${>}$ NVILA\,400k ${\approx}$ NVILA\,800k ${>}$ NVILA\,80k ${>}$ NVILA\,base

entries.claim_text: 物體大小消融:Molmo/NVILA 隨遠物變大正確率下滑,Qwen 全程近亂猜
entries.quoted_snippet: Molmo and NVILA show clear degradation as the farther object becomes larger than the nearer one, whereas Qwen remains near chance throughout

entries.claim_text: 微調版尤其陡，落差可達 0.2 以上
entries.quoted_snippet: For Molmo-7B (2M), mean accuracy rises to $v = 0.801$, but the size-bias gap also grows to $\Delta_s = +0.246$

entries.claim_text: 而是它在這個設定下根本沒有深度判別力
entries.quoted_snippet: This weak sensitivity should not be interpreted as robustness

entries.claim_text: 分析層落在網路約 71% 到 93% 深度處
entries.quoted_snippet: The selected depth of 93\% notably exceeds the 71--75\% range observed in smaller models

entries.claim_text: 原文明說它三軸的連貫表徵「很晚才形成」
entries.quoted_snippet: Coherence across all axes forms very late in this model
